title: Creating a New Superhero
scenario: Design a new superhero with a focus on environmental conservation. The target output should be a detailed persona description.
constraints: Must include a brief backstory for the superhero
Must contain at least 2 environmental-themed abilities

evaluationCriteria.description: Are the constraints met (backstory, environmental-themed abilities)?
Does the description showcase a heroic and inspiring tone?
Does the description accurately answer the prompt regarding the superhero's focus and abilities?
